description_long: This house features a striking modern architectural design with clean, geometric lines and a multi-level, cantilevered structure. The exterior is clad in a combination of gray concrete or composite panels and expansive floor-to-ceiling glass windows, allowing for abundant natural light. A prominent flat roof and open terrace areas are visible, with a large palm tree integrated into the upper outdoor space, adding a touch of greenery. The house includes multiple balconies and overhangs, with some outdoor seating visible on a lower terrace. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with large glass panels dominating the facade and providing panoramic views. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing open space and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, multi-level house with large glass windows, flat roofs, and cantilevered sections, featuring a minimalist gray exterior and integrated outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: This view highlights the cantilevered upper level, large glass windows, and an open terrace with outdoor seating and a palm tree.
description_view_1: From this angle, the integration of the palm tree into the upper terrace is prominent, and the staggered, layered structure of the house is clearly visible.
description_view_2: This side shows the asymmetrical window arrangement and the full height of the house, with the palm tree and open terrace visible at the top.
description_view_3: The rear view emphasizes the flat roof, upper terrace, and extensive use of glass, with the palm tree providing a focal point above the structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with large glass door, no visible steps or porch, and a clean, unadorned facade.
